channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mortal Kombat 2 Review: Fun Action for Fans, but Lacks Emotional Stakes
item.description: Mortal Kombat 2, the latest installment in the long-running franchise, follows the familiar plot of Outworld's villains attempting to conquer Earthrealm through a series of combat tournaments. The fil...

item.title: Two Children Die in Fire Tragedy as Mother Attempts Self-Immolation in Uttar Pradesh
item.description: In a tragic incident in Uttar Pradesh, two young children lost their lives after suffocating while their mother tried to set herself on fire. The unfortunate event took place at the family residence, ...

item.description: Master Hanz Cua, a recognized feng shui expert in the Philippines, provides daily guidance on May 8, 2026. Although the article itself contains limited detailed predictions, it highlights the importan...

item.title: Understanding the Word 'Ube': May 8, 2026 Feature
item.description: On May 8, 2026, ABS-CBN Lifestyle featured the word 'ube' as the Word of the Day. Ube, a popular purple yam widely used in Filipino cuisine, has become an iconic ingredient in desserts such as halaya,...

item.title: Manitoba Reports No Hantavirus Cases Amid Cruise Ship Outbreak
item.description: Manitoba’s chief public health officer, Dr. Brent Roussin, confirmed that there are currently no reported cases of hantavirus in the province. The announcement comes after several cases were identifie...

item.title: Court postpones sentencing for man who admitted starting northern Saskatchewan wildfire
item.description: A Saskatchewan court has delayed sentencing for a man who previously pleaded guilty to starting a wildfire in the northern part of the province. The case centres on an incident that contributed to wil...

item.title: Nida Khan Arrested in Maharashtra Over TCS Conversion Case Allegations

item.title: Municipality Requests Court Order to Evict Resident from Historic Convent
item.description: In Winnipeg, a dispute over a historic convent has escalated to the courts. The municipality is seeking a legal order to remove a man who has refused to vacate the building, claiming that he owns the ...

item.title: 17-Year-Old Boy Remains in Lagos Prison After Nearly Three Years Amid Family Tragedy
item.description: Michael Adeniyi, wey be 17-year-old, don dey prison for Lagos almost three years now. E first get arrested in 2023 when e still be 14 years old by officers for Area F Command, Ikeja. According to repo...

item.title: Assessing the Sydney Swans' early 2026 form and team balance
item.description: The Sydney Swans have kicked off the 2026 AFL season strongly, losing just once in their opening eight matches, reminiscent of their early 2024 form. After narrowly missing the 2024 premiership despit...

item.title: US and Iran clash in Strait of Hormuz amid fragile ceasefire
item.description: Tensions between the United States and Iran escalated on Thursday following a serious exchange of military strikes in the Strait of Hormuz, testing a month-long ceasefire. Iran accused the US of viola...

item.title: UK schools advised to limit pupils’ online photos to prevent AI-driven blackmail

item.title: How Plumbing and Hidden Systems Influence Interior Comfort and Atmosphere

item.title: Waterloo Region proposes framework to manage and allocate limited water capacity

item.description: The Betway Premiership race has reached its critical stage as Mamelodi Sundowns and Orlando Pirates battle for the top spot. Both teams have shown strong form in recent matches, with Sundowns holding ...

item.title: Laikipia Developer Builds Sustainable Cob House Using Local Materials for KSh 300,000
item.description: A man from Laikipia County, Thiong’o wa Gachie, has embraced regenerative living by constructing a two-room cob house using natural and locally available materials at an estimated cost of KSh 300,000....
